Package noppes.npcs.api.handler

Interface IPlayerQuestData

  • public interface IPlayerQuestData
    Tracks a player's quest progress, including active, finished, and tracked quests.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void finishQuest​(int id)
      Marks the quest with the given ID as finished.
      IQuest[] getActiveQuests()  
      IQuest[] getFinishedQuests()  
      long getLastCompletedTime​(int id)
      Returns the timestamp when the quest was last completed.
      IQuest getTrackedQuest()  
      boolean hasActiveQuest​(int id)  
      boolean hasFinishedQuest​(int id)  
      void removeQuest​(int id)
      Removes the quest from both active and finished lists.
      void setLastCompletedTime​(int id, long time)
      Sets the last completed time for the quest.
      void startQuest​(int id)
      Starts the quest with the given ID for the player.
      void stopQuest​(int id)
      Removes the quest from the player's active quest list.

    • Method Detail

      • getTrackedQuest

        IQuest getTrackedQuest()
        Returns:
        the quest currently being tracked by the player, or null if none.

      • startQuest

        void startQuest​(int id)
        Starts the quest with the given ID for the player.
        Parameters:
        id - the quest ID.

      • finishQuest

        void finishQuest​(int id)
        Marks the quest with the given ID as finished.
        Parameters:
        id - the quest ID.

      • stopQuest

        void stopQuest​(int id)
        Removes the quest from the player's active quest list.
        Parameters:
        id - the quest ID.

      • removeQuest

        void removeQuest​(int id)
        Removes the quest from both active and finished lists.
        Parameters:
        id - the quest ID.

      • hasFinishedQuest

        boolean hasFinishedQuest​(int id)
        Parameters:
        id - the quest ID.
        Returns:
        true if the player has finished the quest.

      • hasActiveQuest

        boolean hasActiveQuest​(int id)
        Parameters:
        id - the quest ID.
        Returns:
        true if the player has the quest active.

      • getActiveQuests

        IQuest[] getActiveQuests()
        Returns:
        all active quests for the player.

      • getFinishedQuests

        IQuest[] getFinishedQuests()
        Returns:
        all finished quests for the player.

      • getLastCompletedTime

        long getLastCompletedTime​(int id)
        Returns the timestamp when the quest was last completed.
        Parameters:
        id - the quest ID.
        Returns:
        the completion time, or 0 if never completed.

      • setLastCompletedTime

        void setLastCompletedTime​(int id,
                          long time)
        Sets the last completed time for the quest.
        Parameters:
        id - the quest ID.
        time - the completion timestamp.
